evidence.source_name: Federal Reserve Board - Monetary Policy / FOMC documents
evidence.citation: Federal Reserve page listed April 29, 2026 FOMC statement and May 20, 2026 FOMC minutes as recent documents.
evidence.extracted_insight: Recent FOMC minutes are available and should anchor policy-regime interpretation before increasing duration-sensitive or speculative exposure.

evidence.source_name: Yahoo Finance VIX tape + Cboe VIX dashboard context
evidence.citation: Cboe dashboard page fetched successfully but readable extraction exposed only dashboard context; Yahoo Finance chart API in local artifact supplied VIX 16.70 as of 2026-05-22T20:14:00Z.
evidence.extracted_insight: VIX tape near 16.70 indicates a non-panic volatility backdrop in latest available local market data, but the readable official fetch did not independently verify the spot value and no new-risk posture is authorized.

evidence.source_name: NYSE trading calendar / public holiday confirmation
evidence.citation: NYSE holidays/trading-hours page fetched successfully; search result also surfaced the official 2026 NYSE yearly trading-calendar PDF. Public search snippets independently indicated U.S. stock markets are closed for Memorial Day on Monday, May 25, 2026.
evidence.extracted_insight: May 25, 2026 is Memorial Day; U.S. equity market tape is expected to remain prior-session/holiday-stale rather than live. Do not interpret missing Monday equity movement as a live market signal.

evidence.source_name: Federal Reserve Board - Monetary Policy / FOMC documents
evidence.citation: Federal Reserve monetary policy page fetched at run time listed recent documents: April 29, 2026 FOMC statement, May 20, 2026 FOMC minutes, and June 16-17, 2026 as the next FOMC meeting.
evidence.extracted_insight: Policy-regime interpretation remains anchored to the May 20 minutes and the next scheduled June 16-17 FOMC meeting; no new policy-event claim was promoted in this holiday cycle.

evidence.source_name: FRED public CSV endpoints - rates/credit/inflation checks
evidence.citation: Direct CSV check returned DGS10 4.57 on 2026-05-21; HY OAS 2.78 on 2026-05-21; 10Y breakeven 2.40 on 2026-05-22.
evidence.extracted_insight: Rates/credit checks did not create a new risk-on promotion: 10Y yield remains 4.57, HY OAS 2.78, and 10Y inflation breakeven 2.40 in the latest available FRED observations. Macro permission remains constrained pending post-holiday live tape.

evidence.source_name: Federal Reserve Board - Monetary Policy page direct fetch

evidence.source_name: NYSE holidays/trading-hours page direct fetch

evidence.extracted_insight: Holiday gate remains active: U.S. equity tape should be treated as prior-session/stale, not live Monday evidence. New add/trim decisions require post-holiday source confirmation.

evidence.source_name: Federal Reserve Board - FOMC meeting calendar

evidence.extracted_insight: The latest official policy document available for this cycle is the May 20 release of the April FOMC minutes; policy risk should remain a macro gate for duration-sensitive and speculative exposure.

evidence.source_name: Yahoo Finance chart API - public/unofficial cross-asset check

evidence.source_name: NYSE trading hours and holidays page

evidence.extracted_insight: U.S. equity market freshness is degraded by the holiday closure; live equity confirmation must wait until the next regular session.

evidence.source_name: DuckDuckGo web_search preflight - limited policy/current-news query
evidence.citation: web_search returned official Federal Reserve FOMC calendar plus secondary news results for a May 2026 policy query; this is limited preflight, not a comprehensive market-news sweep.
evidence.extracted_insight: Search access was available for this cycle, but only limited preflight was performed; current-news completeness remains insufficient for normal deployment.

scoring_method.reliability: Official sources score highest; public unofficial market-data endpoints are discounted; search snippets are preflight only unless fetched/confirmed.
scoring_method.relevance: Evidence must connect to policy, rates, credit, volatility, holdings, candidates, or deployment permission.
scoring_method.freshness: Live market data preferred; official macro data accepted with release lag; holiday equity tape is stale by design.
scoring_method.claim_type: fact/inference/speculation separated; action posture cannot rest on speculation alone.
scoring_method.confidence: Composite of reliability, relevance, freshness, corroboration, and whether the claim can change a decision gate.

web_research_state.note: Freshness/current-research claim remains limited. The run does not claim a complete institutional news sweep and keeps deployment blocked.
